channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandon Furniture obstructing pedestrian pathway, 26th March
item.description:
Abandoned seatee , shopping trolly and other household items blocking obstructing pedestrian walkway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Amunds Close, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead, squashed fox on road, 26th March
item.description:
Dead squashed fox. Spread all over road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, St George's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: No brickwork, 26th March
item.description:
Brick work has been missing so long and no one has replaced it, it is being held up by wood and is horrible to look at. Why do we pay council tax and service charge and they can’t brick it up properly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St James Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches fell, 26th March
item.description:
As a result of the wind, tree branches fell on the ground behind the flats on Greenhaven Drive.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fantail Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikenest dangerously placed, 26th March
item.description:
There are three bike nests are places in this area, two are placed together near the junction Kenbury Street making it very difficult to see cars pulling out from Kenbury Street because of the bike nests. From Kebury Street is very difficult to see cars coming up Coldharbour Lane due to the bike nests. Having two next to each other makes it even more difficult as the blindspot is greater. At least with a vehicle in that position you can see some headlights coming through the windows, here you can't even see that.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlights not working, 26th March
item.description:
Streetlights in this part of the road do not work, gets really dark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Haselrigge Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelbarrow, 26th March
item.description:
The Indian person at 37 Station Road has flytipped a wheelbarrow, with concrete on the pavement outside 39 Station Road. The item was originally on the area to the side of 37 Station Road front porch. Rather than use his car to take this wheelbarrow to the dump he’s dumped it on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded white goods on Arkindale Rd, 26th March
item.description:
It looks like a fridge or some form of white goods that has been dumped on the street. It’s been there for over a month!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arkindale Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on Arkindale Road, 26th March
item.description:
A shopping basket filled with rubbish alongside other waste products has been dumped on the street. Been 3 days and counting…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arkindale Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 56a Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping-5th Complaint, 26th March
item.description:
5th Complaint- Flytipping has yet again occurred from here. Health and safety hazard where items blocking the pavement for pedestrians. Multiple complaints of this conduct submitted but the flytipping keeps occurring, thus now reporting the number of times the complaints have been filed, highlighting the complete disregard of not adhering to law regarding fly tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By victoria mews communal bins, 26th March
item.description:
Rubbish and boxes left around victoria road communal bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Street lamp out, 26th March
item.description:
Street lamp out right outside 21 Shirley crescent Br34az Noticed on Wednesday 25th March
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shirley Crescent, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp number 2 outside 3,4 and 5 Blakeney Close, 26th March
item.description:
The lamp was repaired recently (8915369) thank you, however, it has flashing on and off for two nights now. As it's outside our windows it's very disturbing. This happened for a few hours a couple of weeks ago but it righted itself.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bergholt Mews, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th March
item.description:
Flytipping by a resident of 29 de Beauvoir Sq leaving packaging with her name and address on it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree blocking steps, 26th March
item.description:
Fallen tree is blocking steps from Kings Highway to Winns Common

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bleak Hill Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 26th March
item.description:
Dead fox on pavement by bus stop WS on well hall road bordering Oxleas wood, has been there a couple of days now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Well Hall Road, Well Hall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Personal belongings left all over the road, 26th March
item.description:
This prevents people from accessing a private car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchill Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess on pavement around school, 26th March
item.description:
Dog meds not picked up and left for kids to step in and take into school on their shoes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping next to bus stop on Barry Road, 26th March
item.description:
Flytipping next to upland road bus stop on barry Road to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Purley Avenue lime bike dumped, 26th March
item.description:
At this location. Blocking pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Purley Avenue, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
